name: Jo's Baked Garlic Soup
recipeIngredient: 4 or 5 cloves of fresh garlic, minced
1 1/4 cup heavy cream or whipping cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Generously butter a 3-quart baking dish.
3. Combine all ingredients except cheese and cream in the baking dish.
4. Cover and bake for 1 hour at 375°F (190°C).
5. Stir in the cheeses and cream, then lower the heat to 325°F (160°C).
6. Bake for an additional 10 to 15 minutes, ensuring it does not boil.
